allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Templates: {len\(d[\\"data\\"]\)}'\); [print\(f'  #{t[\\"id\\"]} {t[\\"template_code\\"]} · {t[\\"reporting_frequency\\"]} · status={t[\\"status\\"]} · cols={len\([c for c in t.get\(\\"columns\\",[]\) if c[\\"is_enabled\\"]]\)}/{ len\(t.get\(\\"columns\\",[]\)\) } · locked={t[\\"locked\\"]}'\) for t in d['data']]")
Bash(mysql -u hacker -pkamukama poe_2026 -e "SELECT template_code, LEFT\(body_html_template, 200\) AS html_head FROM notification_templates WHERE template_code='ALERT_HIGH';")
Bash(mysql -u hacker -pkamukama poe_2026 -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM notification_templates;")

Bash(mysql -u hacker -pkamukama poe_2026 -N -e "SELECT template_code, CHAR_LENGTH\(COALESCE\(body_text_template,''\)\) AS text_len FROM notification_templates WHERE channel='EMAIL' ORDER BY template_code;")
Bash(mysql -u hacker -pkamukama poe_2026 -N -e "SELECT id, alert_code, country_code, risk_level, routed_to_level FROM alerts ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;")
Bash(mysql -u hacker -pkamukama poe_2026 -e "DELETE FROM notification_suppressions WHERE related_entity_id=11 AND related_entity_type='ALERT';")

Bash(mysql -u hacker -pkamukama poe_2026 -N -e "SELECT template_code, CHAR_LENGTH\(body_html_template\) AS html, CHAR_LENGTH\(body_text_template\) AS txt FROM notification_templates WHERE channel='EMAIL' ORDER BY template_code;")
Bash(mysql -u hacker -pkamukama poe_2026 -N -e "SELECT id, username, full_name FROM users WHERE is_active=1 ORDER BY id LIMIT 5;")
Bash(mysql -u hacker -pkamukama poe_2026 -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM notifications;")
